caveat: Exact bit-identical API payload is not stored. This is the best reconstruction from persisted plans. Missing from brief: series recentIdentityKeys (used []), availableAssets (empty in this run), anti-repetition memory if any.

injected_variables.topic: The accountant who came back from vacation to a week's worth of missed leads — and zero contact details
injected_variables.angle: Walk through the gut-punch moment a small business owner realizes their website was visited dozens of times while they were away, every visitor had a real question, and not one of them left a way to follow up — because the site offered nothing but static text and a contact form nobody filled out. The story exposes how 'being offline' isn't a temporary gap; it's a permanent, invisible leak in your pipeline that happens every single night, every weekend, and every vacation — whether you notice it or not.
injected_variables.creative_identity_environment: a bright co-working space in daylight
